text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Kikuka Sho—the final race of
the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We're finally here at the biggest event of the
autumn season.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Did you know there are superstitions about each
of the three Classic races?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The fastest Umamusume excels in the Satsuki
Sho, the luckiest excels in the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And in the Kikuka Sho... it's the strongest.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I've come here to show my strength—that's my
plan! ♪
choice_data_list: When it comes to power, you're number one!
When it comes to power, you're number one!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I think your idea of strength might be a little
different from mine.
choice_data_list: You're not talking about your physical abilities?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, the strength I'm talking about is...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We didn't choose each other based on talent or
other measures.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We were true to our feelings... and chose the
person we wanted most by our side.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That's why we were both able to get back on our
feet so magnificently after going through the
hardships we did.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We have an irreplaceable bond... And that's
why...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm going to show it to everyone! ♪
choice_data_list: You can do it, Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I will! Wait for me with open arms at the finish
line, my Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something inside her has burst open. I'm sure this
unrestrained Super Creek will get the job done!
